title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIFTEEN HUNDRED AND SIXTY-SEVEN BY ALLOWING GIRLS TO ENROLL IN THE LANAO SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADES.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1986 / 57 OG No. 46, 8278 (November 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3049, June 17, 1961 ]

AN ACT AMENDING SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FIFTEEN HUNDRED AND SIXTY-SEVEN BY ALLOWING GIRLS TO ENROLL IN THE LANAO SCHOOL OF ARTS AND TRADES.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section three of Republic Act Numbered Fifteen hundred and sixty-seven is amended to read as follows:

"SEC. 3. The said school shall be for boys and girls and shall be under the supervision of the Bureau of Public Schools, and be subject to the provisions of the School Law. Courses of junior collegiate and secondary levels shall be offered in the said school."

Approved, June 17, 1961.
